overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA IV) showing a character in a leather jacket walking through a foggy industrial urban area. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses streets, and encounters other pedestrians while rain begins to fall toward the end of the clip.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under a large concrete overpass in an industrial district

large industrial building with metal siding and loading docks
paved concrete sidewalk with visible cracks and stains
metal chain link fence running along the left side of the street
black metal cage enclosure for trash bins on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive highway overpass in a foggy industrial area. The street is empty of pedestrians and vehicles, with industrial warehouses visible across the road and chain link fences lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with parked vehicles and brick buildings

agents.ego_description: walking past parked cars and navigating around street trees while moving through the industrial district

yellow sedan taxi parked further down the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves past a blue muscle car and street trees lining the sidewalk, transitioning from the overpass area to a street with brick industrial buildings. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction as the character navigates around parked vehicles.

rain begins falling, visible as white streaks in the air

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an urban intersection and stops at a red traffic light where several pedestrians are waiting. Rain begins to fall as the character stands on the corner, with a yellow taxi visible on the cross street and industrial buildings surrounding the intersection.

events.description: character crosses the street at the intersection

entered.detail: distant concrete overpass bridge visible through the fog at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: In rainy conditions, the character crosses the intersection and walks along the street toward a distant overpass visible through the fog. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks in the opposite direction as the character moves through the wet industrial streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial district that transitions from a desolate overpass into a rainy urban intersection. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive highway overpass, flanked by chain link fences and empty warehouses. As the camera moves past a blue muscle car and street trees, the environment shifts toward a row of brick industrial buildings where the first pedestrians appear. The scene then opens into a busy intersection where the character stops at a red light, and the dry atmosphere gives way to a steady rainfall. Finally, the camera follows the character as they cross the wet street and head toward a distant overpass, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella amidst the rain-slicked industrial landscape.
